title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: James only succeeded because of his teacher's encouragement.
questions.secondSentence: If it (1) _________ his teacher's encouragement, James wouldn't have succeeded.

questions.firstSentence: I think it would be a good idea to contact them by email.
The manager said he was sorry he was late.
Very few people came to the meeting.
They are going to renovate the hotel during the summer.
questions.secondSentence: The hotel is going (1) _________ during the summer.

questions.firstSentence: You should not leave the building without permission.
questions.secondSentence: Under (1) _________ leave the building without permission.
